title: Yijing Hexagram 30: Li (The Clinging)
description: Hexagram 30 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 30 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Clinging. Perseverance furthers. It brings success. Care of the cow brings good fortune.
